trending_videos.title: Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer LEAK Explained | Sneak Peek
trending_videos.description:
HOW, exactly, do Spider-Man trailers leak? We brought in an expert to explain!

The Spider-Man Brand New Day trailer leaked in the past week, ahead of it’s planned release on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. In this episode of The Sneak Peek on New Rockstars, hosts Erik Voss and Jessica Clemons bring on a past assistant editor at trailer editing companies, Abby Freel, to explain the inside process of how big movie trailers are edited, how many people are involved, and why this happens to Sony for the Spider-Man Brand New Day second trailer, and not for the highly anticipated Avengers Doomsday trailer from Marvel Studios / Disney!

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.com/@WitchingHourNR
youtube.com/@BreakroomNR

trending_videos.title: Dead by Daylight | 10th Anniversary Broadcast
trending_videos.description:
Celebrate 10 years of Dead by Daylight with our biggest Anniversary broadcast ever. We’re pulling out all the stops with massive reveals, exciting Chapter announcements, incredible special guests, and a game-changing look at the next 10 years in The Fog.  
 
Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits. Pick a side and step into a world of tension and terror with horror gaming's best asymmetrical multiplayer.       
 
PLAY DEAD BY DAYLIGHT: https://buythegame.deadbydaylight.com/    
 
Join the official forum:  https://forums.bhvr.com/dead-by-daylight/ 
 
 Like and follow us on our official Social Media Channels:      
- Facebook:  https://facebook.com/DeadByDaylight 
- Twitter:  https://twitter.com/DeadbyDaylight 
- Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/deadbydaylight/ 
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@deadbydaylight

trending_videos.title: Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek - Official Crossover Event Announcement Trailer
trending_videos.description: Take a look at the announcement trailer for Brawlhalla  x DreamWorks Animation’s Shrek crossover event. Ubisoft, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences, announced the crossover event launching on July 29. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to  Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion. The event will also include a Map featuring Shrek’s iconic Swamp and other items inspired by fairy tale creatures. Additional details on the crossover and those other Items will be shared at a later date. The Brawlhalla  x Shrek crossover event is launching on July 29.
tags: Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek game trailer

gaming.description: Gaming-related content is the most dominant genre, appearing in half of the trending videos. This includes game trailers, gameplay, and game-related events.
gaming.opportunity: Focus on creating engaging gaming content, such as reaction videos, gameplay commentary, and event coverage to capitalize on this interest.

entertainment.description: This category covers a mix of trailers, sneak peeks, and reaction videos.
entertainment.opportunity: Consider producing content that combines entertainment with analysis or commentary, as this approach is popular among viewers.

music.description: Music videos are less represented but still present, indicating potential for growth, especially with unique or niche genres.
music.opportunity: Explore collaborations with gamers or entertainers to cross-promote music content.

single_representation.description: All top creators listed have only one video each trending, suggesting a diverse range of creators rather than a few dominant ones.
single_representation.opportunity: Encourage creators to diversify their content within their niche to increase the likelihood of multiple videos trending.

New Rockstars.suggestion: Continue leveraging the breakdown format and explore new trending entertainment topics.

SMii7Y.suggestion: Expand the types of games covered to attract a wider audience.

Jeremy Ice & Fire 33.suggestion: Deepen engagement with audiences by creating follow-up content post-episode releases.

Dead by Daylight.suggestion: Integrate interactive elements such as live Q&A sessions during announcements to boost engagement.

Nación Mexa.suggestion: Explore collaborations with artists in other trending genres to increase visibility.

cross-genre content.description: Combining elements from different trending genres, such as gaming and entertainment, can attract diverse audiences.
cross-genre content.actionable_strategy: Develop content that includes interactive elements, such as live reactions or challenges, to engage viewers across multiple interests.

localized content expansion.description: Videos in specific languages or regions have the potential to capture niche markets.
localized content expansion.actionable_strategy: Create localized versions of popular content or collaborate with local influencers to tap into regional markets.

emerging trends.description: Stay ahead by identifying emerging topics within the dominant genres, such as new game releases or upcoming movie trailers.
emerging trends.actionable_strategy: Use predictive analytics to forecast trending topics and prepare content in advance to capture early interest.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
